focus_anchor: current focus consolidate the operator manual into auto triggered cross runtime skills
why_now: the agentskills.io standard just converged across Claude + Codex and the codex backend just shipped, but today's deploy only targets the Claude skills directory and leaves the discovery pointer hand-edited — so a Codex operator session cannot discover the skills at all; this closes that gap and delivers the cross-runtime onboarding surface the OSS cut needs.
